uplink.description: Landis+Gyr heat-meter standard frame (fPort 2): energy, volume, power, flow, flow/return temperature, serial, error flag
uplink._note: Upstream-example input (TheThingsNetwork elvaco/cmi4110-codec.yaml, Apache-2.0). expected.data authored here by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle) and mapping BCD records to the vocabulary: energy kWh->Wh (x1000), volume m3->L (x1000), power kW->W (x1000), flow_temperature->water.temperature.current; flow/return-temperature/serial/error are camelCase extras. Satisfies power-meter (metering.energy.total, power.active) and water-meter (metering.water.total).
Upstream only decodes the standard heat-meter frame on fPort 2.

uplink.description: fPort 2 but payload shorter than the standard frame -> error
uplink._note: Upstream rejects standard frames under 40 bytes.
